\tzpentry{ID5737}{Tunnel Quantum Pressure Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5737 introduces Tunnel Quantum Pressure Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} P_{tunnel} = \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} A_n \exp\left(-\frac{S_n}{\hbar}\right) \end{equation}
